101001111111000100011110100000010110110010010011010101 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  010 = 0 * 10
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 10 * 1
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01000 = 010 * 00
  10011 = 100 * 11
  000101 = 000 * 101
  010101 = 010 * 101
  101100 = 101 * 100
  1010011 = 10 * 10011
  1111100 = 1111 * 100
  10010011 = 100 * 10011
  111101000 = 1111 * 01000
  000101101100 = 000101 * 101100
  01000111101000 = 01000 * 111101000
  10010011010101 = 10010011 * 010101
  10100111111100 = 1010011 * 1111100
  00010110110010010011010101 = 000101101100 * 10010011010101
  1010011111110001000111101000 = 10100111111100 * 01000111101000
  101001111111000100011110100000010110110010010011010101 = 1010011111110001000111101000 * 00010110110010010011010101
